So anyway, as I was saying, okay logical certainty is basically a left-raised logic it's about Value proposition cost benefit ratio whether a product empirically meets someone's needs That's what logical certainty is all about and it's a Function it's logic right and the way That we create logical certainty typically is through the words that we say We make what's called an airtight logical case Now with the straight line system we engage in something called strategic preparation what I mean by that is that since we know that we have to get our prospect To a very high level of logical certainty how I will let's this thing's actually sucks by the way. Let me try it red today Okay, so let's watch this certainly sale one represents the state of absolute Uncertainty mean they hate your product think it sucks right worse piece of shit in the world Then you want to look at just this awful right? It doesn't meet their needs. It's overpriced It looks kind of shoddy workmanship on it right? It's not gonna have a positive cost benefit ratio, right? Not a good match for them. It's worse in the competition That's a one biggest piece of shit in the world and then you have what's called a tech that means they are absolutely Positively certain that it's the best thing since sliced bread. They love it It meets all their needs it Makes sense to them and they just think you know those logical certainty when someone you're logically certain about something It means that you can connect all the dots in your mind You can sort of say you know from start to finish The whole thing makes sense to me and you can then therefore explain it To someone else does when you when you're logically certain about something you can explain to someone else why it makes sense to you very easily That's very different than emotional certainty Emotional certainties of gut feeling which says you know, I just I just want this. I have to have this It's gonna it's gonna make me feel better. That's emotional certainty. It's visceral. It's in your gut It's not about adding up all the features and benefits. It's not about value proposition. It's mostly about this someone imagining themselves in the future using your product and feeling good in other words People typically buy things because they are feeling some sort of pain discomfort uncomfortability Right out of control in some way they can't take their some part of their life is not in control And they buy some they spend their hard-earned money. They purchase something To get back into control or to resolve their pain or to fill that void or lack that need so to speak, right To resolve a need that's basically why people buy stuff. Okay, so emotional certainty is when they save themselves I see myself six months in the future Using your product and feeling great For a car salesman, it's like imagine yourself driving down the road with the top down the wind in your hair You feel like a million bucks sexy great gorgeous girl sitting next to you All right, just cruise down just like exhilarating with that rumbling engine. That's emotional certainty for if I'm selling a car logical certainty is the value of this car all the other competing cars from the other they are more expensive or these There's more features and benefits. So it's it's more like You know abcd versus just imagine yourself in this car feeling awesome So those are your two types of certainty, right? We have our a lot of certainty which is generated by words And then we have emotional certainty right over here our emotional certainty which is generated with two things one is called future pacing And that means as I just said someone imagines themselves In the future At some point down there having made the decision to buy your prop and they are now using it and feeling good That's emotional certainty, right? And the second way That we create this which is the one I really want to focus on today Because it's almost like a hack for creating emotional certainty. It's a sales hack so to speak No, that's kind of a I always hate the thing we want to fucking life hack But it kind of is a shortcut to creating emotional certainty and the way we do that is using tonality There's a certain Total strategy that you may have heard me talk about before it's called pace pace lead Now you might have been taught this by someone else, but here's the thing There's pace pace lead and there's pace pace fucking lead ninja style on steroids That's the way I teach it and here's the deal. It doesn't fucking work the other way pace pace lead is a waste of fucking time Pace pace fucking lead works and gets you where you want to go Now what's the difference between two that's what this training is all about. So what happens is my first pattern Here, my first loop is designed to loop back into presentation mode And now what I'm gonna do is I have my airtight logical frame And now I'm gonna fill in my frame with all the beautiful accoutrements and all the benefits In other words, I frame an airtight logical case in the beginning. That's the key Just remember this in closing here the key to closing at the highest level is you must make the person both Logically and emotionally certain one without the other does not work very well remember in the absence of Logical certainty, you know what happens the person's like says bullshit bullshit the logical mind serves as a human Bullshit detector. That's what it's there for to essentially protect us. I'm gonna put this here. So you think I don't want to Know it so so again The logical mind serves as the human bullshit detector It's designed to stop you from getting carried away By hyping bullshit. That's what's happening So if you don't get someone extremely certain on a logical level As they start to being moved emotionally that raises bullshit and holds them back however Once you create that airtight logical case A really a stream from the hilltops airtight logical case It then frees them up To be moved emotionally very easily.
